name: supergraph
description: Graph-driven AI coding workflows with Serena MCP integration. Covers the full dev cycle: scan → plan → TDD → fix → integration → verify → review. Graph analysis (blast radius, hub nodes, communities) + Serena LSP tools (diagnostics, symbol navigation, safe rename/replace). Skills optimized for token efficiency. Supports Node.js, Flutter, PHP, Python, Go, Rust, and more.
